title: How to Help a Choking Dog
description: A step-by-step visual guide to safely performing the canine Heimlich manoeuvre and clearing airway obstructions in dogs.

title: Dog Poisoning: What To Do
description: Learn how to identify signs of poisoning in dogs and the immediate steps to take while transporting to an emergency vet.

title: Cat Choking Emergency Response
description: Visual demonstration of how to safely identify and respond to a choking episode in cats without causing further harm.
